news.headline: New round of Israel-Lebanon talks opens after Israeli strikes
news.summary: The ambassadors of Israel and Lebanon began a new round of direct talks in Washington on after US President Donald Trump said he had received commitments to de-escalation from both sides. The fourth meeting between representatives of the two countries, which do not have diplomatic relations, is taki
